title: Scape & Run - Parasites: Retextured
description: To give out a unique feel for SRP's textures for detail and reduced amount of colours, it features good use for emissive textures and mcpatcher's multi-textured mobs.
body:
To give out a unique feel for SRP's textures for detail and reduced amount of colours, it features good use for emissive textures and mcpatcher's multi-textured mobs.

Optifine is required for this resource pack for it's features.

To follow further development updates or having issues with the resource pack, please contact me at the official SRP discord server provided by the mod's page or it's wiki.
